items.title: Apotheka
items.name: Apotheka
items.description: A Poblacion underground institution with baile-funk, global club, house, Detroit techno, jungle, and '90s electro across two floors.

description_localized.en: A Poblacion underground institution with baile-funk, global club, house, Detroit techno, jungle, and '90s electro across two floors.

items.notes: Tucked behind its iconic red door in the heart of Poblacion, Apotheka remains one of Manila's consistent underground institutions. The main floor leans into baile-funk, global club, and house; the mezzanine delivers sharper Detroit techno, jungle, and '90s electro.

items.title: KINKI
items.name: KINKI
items.description: A Poblacion-Makati venue and event series delivering raw, community-led programming across house, techno, breaks, and experimental nights.

description_localized.en: A Poblacion-Makati venue and event series delivering raw, community-led programming across house, techno, breaks, and experimental nights.

items.notes: KINKI operates as both a venue and an event series (kinki.love), delivering raw, community-led programming across multiple nights. Signature series include ELEPHANT THURSDAYS, KINKI LOVE, and PROVIDER. The space favors risk-taking and unpolished underground energy over commercial polish.

items.title: UNKNWN
items.name: UNKNWN
items.description: A Manila collective that relocates underground parties into organic markets, warehouses, unfinished buildings, and heritage sites.

description_localized.en: A Manila collective that relocates underground parties into organic markets, warehouses, unfinished buildings, and heritage sites.

items.notes: UNKNWN transforms Manila's buttoned-up nightlife by relocating parties into unlikely spaces: organic markets, unfinished buildings, warehouses, and heritage sites. The collective prioritizes curated lineups that blend local talent with regional voices, featuring residents Emel Rowe, Samantha Nicole, JAV, Tomas, and Randy Salvador.
